form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Most recently 2nd in a small field at this track on March 7 over 1408m, 4 len behind Tiger Rocket carrying 55.5kg at $2.96. The run before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1207m, 9 len behind Bold Love with 55.5kg at $3.90. Genuine hope on best form.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 9 at Saratoga on July 4 over 1308m, 22 len behind Fort Nelson with 54kg at $48. Win would surprise.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 9 at Saratoga on July 4 over 1308m, 22 len behind Fort Nelson with 54kg at $48. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fifth of 7 at Saratoga June 7 over 1408m, 11 len behind Stars And Strides with 53.5kg at $7.90. On debut third of 8 at this track April 25 over 1308m, 2 len behind Protected with 53.5kg at $6.90. Can go on with the job this prep.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign fifth of 7 at Saratoga June 7 over 1408m, 11 len behind Stars And Strides with 53.5kg at $7.90. On debut third of 8 at this track April 25 over 1308m, 2 len behind Protected with 53.5kg at $6.90. Can go on with the job this prep.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 3rd of 7 at Monmouth Park on August 31 over 1207m, 3 len behind La Frost carrying 54kg at $3.50. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 3rd of 7 at Monmouth Park on August 31 over 1207m, 3 len behind La Frost carrying 54kg at $3.50. This is an ideal race to kick off. Top hope.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run gave a sight but was run down late 2nd in a small field at this track on March 13 over 1609m, 0.8 len behind Antietam with 54kg at $5.37. The run before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1609m, 5 len behind Ice Shot carrying 52kg at $26.67. In the money at the latest appearance and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Last start 3rd in a small field at this track on March 8 over 1408m, 4.5 len behind Roger Roger carrying 57kg at $6.46. The race before that raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at this track on February 4 over 1408m, 2.75 len behind Oil Capital carrying 55.5kg at $20.75. Hard to beat if he brings his A-game.
